message:
ui: simplify AI Missions sidebar toolbar and enlarge Orbit dialog (#9371)

- Replace Globe + Rocket buttons and font-size controls (— T +) with a
  single + dropdown menu (New Mission / Browse Community / Mission Control)
- Add click-outside handler to close the + dropdown
- Remove unused fontSize state, FontSize type, and useCallback import
- Increase StandaloneOrbitDialog from max-w-md to max-w-2xl (~50% wider)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
